textPlain: I changed the title to one with a more clear relationship to the page.Bertrand Russel was a prominent logician and philosopher, more or less invented types to solve a problem he was having with set theory.https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bertrand_RussellSir Oswald Mosley founded the British Union of Fascists.https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oswald_Mosley
